utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: What one ? You wanted him to invite you to the party and he did it !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah , but he waited until the last minute !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: So if I said yes , he would know I had nothing better to do than wait around for an invitation to his stupid party .

emotion_cause.span: 3_if I said yes , he would know I had nothing better to do than wait around for an invitation to his stupid party .
3_if I said yes , he would know I had nothing better to do than wait around for an invitation to his stupid party .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Which puts me right back in the driver seat .

emotion_cause.span: 5_Which puts me right back in the driver seat .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Great . So the ball is in his court ?

emotion_cause.span: 6_So the ball is in his court ?
6_So the ball is in his court ?
